message:
refactor: Remove dead GROUP BY code, fix MIN/MAX codegen bug

- Remove dead executeWithGroupBy, executeWithGroupByVectorEngine,
  preloadGroupByColumns from executor.zig (JIT path is used instead)
- Remove dead processBatchF64, processBatchI64 from vector_engine.zig
  (WASM uses buildGroups + aggregateF64 separately)
- Fix MIN/MAX aggregate codegen: initialize to +inf/-inf instead of 0,
  remove undefined 'found' variable reference
- Add streaming_reader.zig for column streaming support

Single code path: CLI uses JIT, WASM uses HashGroupBy
